title: Data and code: Gut microbiota structure differs between honey bees in winter and summer
author: Lucie Kešnerová
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains data and code underlying the qPCR, amplicon sequencing, and statistical analysis of the research article "Gut microbiota structure differs between honey bees in winter and summer”. Short read datasets are available under NCBI Bioproject accession PRJNA578869.
steps_raw: This dataset contains data and code underlying the qPCR, amplicon sequencing, and statistical analysis of the research article "Gut microbiota structure differs between honey bees in winter and summer”. Short read datasets are available under NCBI Bioproject accession PRJNA578869.
